name: rss
description: Reads RSS channel metadata and feed items from any RSS 2.0 feed URL. Read-only and credential-free.

risk.read: external RSS feed read (XML over HTTP/HTTPS)

conformance.reason: StreamHook/CheckHook-handled: every read AND the health check decode an RSS/XML response body (encoding/xml), which the engine's declarative fixture-replay path cannot express (it only decodes JSON bodies, engine/read.go); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/hooks/rss/hooks_test.go and archived parity evidence for rss
